name: Chicken Parmesan II
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound chicken until thin.
2. Pat dry and cut into pieces.
3. Combine bread crumbs, parmesan cheese, spices, and salt. Set aside.
4. Beat eggs in a shallow dish. Dip chicken into egg, then into the crumb mixture, coating both sides.
5. Heat oil in a skillet. Saute' chicken until brown - about 3 minutes on each side. Remove to a warm platter.
6. Drain fat.
7. Stir in wine, scraping up brown residue until it boils.
8. Pour over chicken.
